Introducing

The evolution of Finance on Blockchain technology.

BankSocial is your gateway to a full range of financial services using blockchain technology available globally.

learn more
Payments
P ayments
Visit page
Transfer
Tran sfe r
Visit page
Global Access
Glob al A cce ss
Visit page
Lending
Lend ing
Visit page
Business Services
Busi nes s Se rvi ces
Visit page
Borderless

Payments are done without any geographical limitations.

Instant Settlement

No waiting period, you get access to your money instantly.

Easy Setup

Online and in-store payments within the same platform.

Pre-Verified

Every individual and business is verified, this way you know who you're dealing with.

Instant Transfer

The ability to instantly send money to anyone, anytime, anywhere.

Security

All transmitted data is encrypted on multiple servers with no external access.

Peace of Mind

Be confident knowing that your financial services are available offline.

No Borders

Access to services and connectivity no matter where you are.

Regulated

Regulated in every jurisdiction worldwide ensuring global availability.

Peer-to-Peer

Proprietary FinTech that allows you to lend and borrow from your peers globally.

Cross Border Lending

Receive and provide seamless international financing worldwide.

Credit and Finance

Instant credit and financing available worldwide for personal and business use.

Payment Gateway

Accept cards, transfers, and crypto, and receive payouts as you please.

International Exchange

Instantly exchange currencies and crypto to each other globally.

Universal Acceptance

Let your customers pay in local currencies, we take care of the rest.

We Are

Changing Finance As you know it.

Explore more

Obligation

© BankSocial®, a division of Fivancial, Inc.
BankSocial is a MSB regulated in jurisdictions it serves. BankSocial is not a chartered bank or trust company, or depository institution. It is not authorized to accept deposits or trust accounts and is not licensed or regulated by any state or federal banking authority. Crypto is not FDIC or NCUA insured.
